3050210.name: Exjanitor: Data Cleanup
3050210.description:
Imagine this scenario: You've been the janitor at your company for 25 YEARS, and despite being a bit off-kilter, you're happy there... until the day the employees start disappearing... What's happening? The future, my friends!! Lamass Corp. is now part of the new industrial revolution, and the employees have been replaced by robots. Isn't that wonderful? The final straw comes when Zildo himself is called to the office and fired, replaced by another pile of bolts! Can you believe it? The most amazing and valuable employee in the company...

You are Zildo, the janitor of the corporation... And if you don't care about the situation, that's your problem! Zildo (who isn't very balanced himself) lost his cool, and now it's personal. It's no longer about your old job, it's about reclaiming what was yours by kicking some robot butt!

Explore procedurally generated worlds, find different weapons to rid the world of robots, and destroy them to gain chips and condition! Condition chips can enhance your weapon power-ups by creating conditions within the game (like doubling your shots when standing on an orange block). Equip as many as you want; the weapons are yours!
3050210.supported_languages:
葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
